steps.description: Type the text "bot app with sso enable" into the search/filter input field located above the sample list in the "Samples" tab of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension within Visual Studio Code.

Click the "Create" button for the "Bot App with SSO Enabled" sample project in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit Samples tab within Visual Studio Code.
And input ${{var:app_name:sso-bot}} into the run time variable.
Click the "View prompts" link in the message suggestions pop-up at the bottom-right of the Microsoft Teams web chat interface.
Click the "Show" prompt suggestion within the "Prompt Suggestions from sso-botlocal" pop-up in the Microsoft Teams web app chat interface.
Click the "Send" button in the chat input area of the Microsoft Teams web interface to submit the message "show" to the sso-botlocal bot.
Click the "Add" button for the sso-botlocal app card in the Microsoft Teams chat interface.
Click the blue "Accept" button on the Microsoft permissions request dialog to grant access to the bot-sso-aad app in the Microsoft account login interface.
